videos.title: 29.4: Vladar BLANKS Penguins! 42 Saves to Win the Series 🔥🧱
videos.summary_source_text:
29.4: Vladar BLANKS Penguins! 42 Saves to Win the Series 🔥🧱 Dan Vladar delivers an incredible performance with 42 saves, recording the most saves by a Philadelphia Flyers goalie in a series-clinching win! He earns his second career postseason shutout in a 1-0 overtime victory over the Pittsburgh Penguins in Game 6, sending the Flyers to Round 2.

videos.title: Flyers advance to 2nd round after ousting in-state rivals!

videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 29th April, Wednesday - Weekly Updates 29/04/26

🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 29/04/26

videos.title: Pastrnak Delivers in OT, Oilers Survive & Massive Game 5’s Ahead | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Pastrnak Delivers in OT, Oilers Survive & Massive Game 5’s Ahead | Daily Faceoff Live David Pastrnak plays hero in overtime as the Boston Bruins stay alive, while the Edmonton Oilers respond at home to keep their series alive. With several massive Game 5 matchups across the NHL Playoffs, pressure is building — and momentum is everything.

We break down Connor McDavid’s heavy workload after logging 24 minutes, whether that usage is sustainable, and how the Oilers managed to limit the Anaheim Ducks to just one goal — despite their dangerous power play.

Out West, the Minnesota Wild steal home-ice advantage and head home with a chance to close out the Dallas Stars. Is Jake Oettinger starting to show cracks, or are defensive breakdowns leaving him exposed? And can Dallas find a way to force Game 7?

We also dive into the critical Game 5 matchups between Tampa Bay and Montreal, plus Utah and Vegas — and discuss just how important home-ice advantage really is at this stage of the playoffs.

videos.title: Life after Messi: Is the US Open Cup the Rapids' Best Chance for a Trophy?
videos.summary_source_text:
Life after Messi: Is the US Open Cup the Rapids' Best Chance for a Trophy? The road to silverware starts tonight. With the MLS season proving to be a gauntlet, the Lamar Hunt U.S. Open Cup has officially become the most direct path for the Colorado Rapids to bring a trophy back to the Mile High City.
In today’s episode, the DNVR Rapids crew previews tonight's Round of 16 "Derby" against the Colorado Springs Switchbacks at Dick’s Sporting Goods Park. After a historic night at Empower Field that saw the second-largest crowd in MLS history (75,824 fans!) witness a battle against Lionel Messi and Inter Miami, we re-evaluate where this team stands in the Western Conference hierarchy.
How do the recent results against Miami, LAFC, and Vancouver shift our expectations for the rest of 2026? We dive into the tactical adjustments needed for the cup, the latest news surrounding the Denver Summit, and why tonight's matchup against the Switchbacks is a "must-win" for momentum.
On today’s show:
• US Open Cup Fever: Is this the Rapids' best chance at hardware this season?
• The Messi Effect: Reflecting on a historic, record-breaking afternoon at Mile High.  
After 10 games: the Rapids sit in the middle of the pack in the West (4-5-1). The US Open Cup offers a chance to pivot from "playoff hopeful" to "trophy winner.”
• Western Conference Reality Check: Analyzing the gap between the Rapids and the top-tier contenders like LAFC and Vancouver.
• The Local Derby: Previewing tonight’s Round of 16 clash vs. Colorado Springs Switchbacks.
• Summit & Rapids News: Updates on the local soccer landscape and the NWSL's Denver Summit.
• Tactical Preview: Who starts tonight? Rotating the squad for the midweek cup tie.

0:00 - Intro
5:06 - The DNVR Rapids crew gives their expectations for the remainder of the season
7:45 - What's keeping the Rapids from being a top-tier team? 
18:00 - Biggest takeaways from the Miami matchup at Mile High
27:36 - Big takeaways from the Vancouver matchup
33:27 - US Open cup predictions
40:09 - Previewing the Switchbacks matchup Wednesday night

videos.title: Scott Wedgewood, Not A Vezina Finalist, Is the Latest Avs Player to Get Snubbed For a League Award
videos.summary_source_text:
Scott Wedgewood, Not A Vezina Finalist, Is the Latest Avs Player to Get Snubbed For a League Award Colorado Avalanche fans voice outrage as Scott Wedgewood is snubbed for the Vezina Trophy despite league-leading numbers. Should elite team defense penalize goalies, or is the NHL media simply favoring familiar names? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson offer a fiery breakdown of Wedgewood’s historic season, the merits of his overlooked stats, and question if the Avalanche’s overall strength is hurting individual award chances for stars like Nathan MacKinnon and Cale Makar.

The conversation shifts to NHL playoff intensity as Jamie Benn escapes suspension for a blatant cross-check, sparking debate on league discipline and double standards after past suspensions for Nazem Kadri and Makar. Plus, The Hockey News Top 100 players list is revealed—find out which Avalanche stars moved up, slid down, or got their due at last. Can Colorado’s standouts break through media biases and claim their hardware, or will the snubs keep coming?

videos.title: Flyers In 6 & Habs Take Game 5 ft. Riley Cote, Dave Jackson & Steve Peters| Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Flyers In 6 & Habs Take Game 5 ft. Riley Cote, Dave Jackson & Steve Peters| Morning Cuppa Hockey Season 3 of Morning Cuppa Hockey keeps rolling with another jam-packed episode as Jonny Lazarus and Colby Cohen bring in a trio of great guests to break down all the latest from the Stanley Cup Playoffs. First up, Riley Cote joins the show to dive into the Flyers’ big Game 6 win over the Penguins, clinching the series and punching their ticket to Round 2 where they’ll face the Carolina Hurricanes. Then, former NHL referee and current ESPN analyst Dave Jackson stops by to give his perspective on officiating across the postseason, highlighting key calls, controversies, and how the standard has been set so far. To wrap things up, Steve Peters joins the guys to recap Game 5 of Canadiens vs. Lightning and Golden Knights vs. Mammoth, while also weighing in on the growing buzz around the Maple Leafs and the possibility of John Chayka stepping in as their next General Manager.

Don’t miss a second of the daily hockey talk!

videos.title: Amazing Drill to Square Your Clubface #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Amazing Drill to Square Your Clubface #golfswing #golftips Weak iron shots often start with the clubface opening too much in the backswing. When the face points skyward early and stays open at the top, golfers are forced to add loft and compensate through impact. Improving face control earlier in the swing helps strengthen loft, compress the ball, and produce straighter, more powerful shots.
If clubface control or weak iron strikes are something you’re working on, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans help you square the face earlier and build compression that holds up under pressure — without guessing.

OpenClaw 4.27 Release: Deep Infra Provider, Codex Computer Use, and Major Reliability Fixes

OpenClaw 4.27 focuses on reliability and stability, adding Deep Infra as a built-in provider for cheaper access to many AI models via one API key across chat, images, audio, video, embeddings, and more. It introduces Codex Computer Use so agents can control the desktop through a setup flow with fail-closed safety checks. File attachments in chat now properly stage non-image files (PDFs, docs, spreadsheets) instead of silently dropping them. Model selection is stricter, preventing silent model switching and making cron jobs fail closed when the chosen model is unavailable unless explicit fallback lists are configured. Major channel fixes improve Telegram (clear token errors, timeouts, preserved images), Slack (ping/pong keepalives, download timeouts, reset phrase handling), Discord (private-by-default replies and async interactions), and Matrix (no duplicate messages), plus faster gateway startup, outbound proxy routing, improved Windows restart handoffs, cleaner session resets, and more reliable memory “dreaming” with caps and retry behavior.

videos.title: Justin Simmons Announces his Retirement from the NFL | Weekly Cut | Guerilla Sports
videos.summary_source_text:
Justin Simmons Announces his Retirement from the NFL | Weekly Cut | Guerilla Sports In this emotional episode of The Weekly Cut, Justin Simmons opens up about his decision to retire from the NFL after an incredible career. From his early days chasing the dream to becoming a leader with the Denver Broncos, Justin reflects on legacy, gratitude, and why family ultimately came first.

Justin and co-host Louie Romero dive deep into the emotions behind stepping away from the game, sharing honest insight into the sacrifices of NFL life, the toll of playing away from family, and the moment he found peace with his decision.

Plus, undefeated pro boxer Ebenezer “Stuntman” Griffith joins the show to break down his journey, mindset, and what’s next as he continues rising in the boxing world—sharing inspiration rooted in discipline, faith, and purpose.

videos.summary_source_text:
TJ Hughes on Michigan Hockey, NHL Dreams & Faceoff Secrets | The Sheet Inside Yost Arena, TJ Hughes sits down with Jeff Marek to break down his journey from minor hockey in Hamilton to becoming captain of the Michigan Wolverines men's ice hockey — one of the most prestigious programs in college hockey.

From his time with the Brooks Bandits to competing at the Spengler Cup, Hughes shares how his path shaped him into a top NCAA free agent and emerging NHL prospect.

A major focus? Faceoffs — and how studying Sidney Crosby (and even Connor Bedard) frame-by-frame has helped elevate his game.

If you’re into NHL prospects, NCAA hockey, and player development, this is a must-watch.

videos.summary_source_text: Rookie Of The Year Cooper Flagg's Hard Work PAID OFF 🏆 Dallas Mavericks Rookie of the Year Cooper Flagg addressed the media for the first time since taking home his first NBA award. videos.title: Denver Broncos 2026 Draft Class Review: Tyler Onyedim, Jonah Coleman & UDFA Steals!
videos.summary_source_text:
Denver Broncos 2026 Draft Class Review: Tyler Onyedim, Jonah Coleman & UDFA Steals! The 2026 NFL Draft is in the books. While the Denver Broncos didn't start their weekend until the third round after trading down from Pick 62, George Paton and Sean Payton were busy fortifying the roster with physical, high-motor prospects. From a new disruptor on the defensive interior to a dynamic weapon in the backfield, the "culture fit" was the theme of the weekend.
In today's episode, the DNVR Draft crew breaks down all seven selections, starting with Texas A&M DT Tyler Onyedim and Washington RB Jonah Coleman. We also dive into a deep and talented Undrafted Free Agent (UDFA) class—highlighted by names like Taurean York and Dane Key—to see who has the best path to the 53-man roster.
On today’s show:
• The Big Picture: Why the Broncos view Jaylen Waddle as their "de facto" first-round pick and how that changes the grade for this class.
• Round 3 Recap: Is Tyler Onyedim the long-term successor to John Franklin-Myers?
• Offensive Rebuild: Analyzing the additions of RB Jonah Coleman, OL Kage Casey, and the double-dip at tight end with Justin Joly and Dallen Bentley.
• UDFA Watch: Why LB Taurean York (Texas A&M) and WR Dane Key (Nebraska) are the early favorites to be this year's "hidden gems."
• Late Round Value: Can 7th-rounders like safety Miles Scott or linebacker Red Murdock make a splash on special teams?
• The Final Grade: Our immediate reactions and long-term outlook for the Broncos' 2026 haul.

videos.title: Avs Players REACT to Wedgewood Vezina SNUB, Josh Manson's Injury & More Inside Avs Playoff Practice
videos.summary_source_text:
Avs Players REACT to Wedgewood Vezina SNUB, Josh Manson's Injury & More Inside Avs Playoff Practice Get the latest Colorado Avalanche practice update as Jared Bednar addresses Josh Manson’s status after Colorado’s first-round sweep of the Los Angeles Kings and the Avs begin preparing for Round 2. Hear why the Avalanche are embracing the rest over rust debate during their playoff break, how that time could help Colorado get healthier, and what the team is saying about adapting its style for whoever comes next. Plus, we break down Scott Wedgewood’s Vezina Trophy snub after the NHL named Ilya Sorokin, Jeremy Swayman, and Andrei Vasilevskiy as finalists, and why the Avalanche locker room is locked in on the only award that matters — the Stanley Cup. Bailey Curtis goes inside Colorado Avalanche practice for the latest news, updates, and more.

videos.title: Doctor Explains Bo Nix's Ankle Fracture, Recovery Timeline, 2nd Procedure & More
videos.summary_source_text:
Doctor Explains Bo Nix's Ankle Fracture, Recovery Timeline, 2nd Procedure & More Denver Broncos quarterback Bo Nix’s ankle fracture is one of the biggest stories of the offseason, and in this video an orthopedic ankle specialist, Doctor Aditya Yerrapragada, breaks down exactly what happened, why a second “cleanup” procedure can be normal, and what it means for Bo Nix’s recovery. We explain Bo Nix’s ankle injury timeline, how cartilage and hardware factor into healing, whether Broncos fans should worry about long-term issues, and why this type of follow-up procedure matters for an NFL quarterback. The latest reporting says Nix’s recent ankle procedure was planned, the Broncos will be conservative with his offseason workload, and he is still expected to be ready for training camp. Watch now for an expert medical breakdown of Bo Nix’s ankle fracture, recovery timeline, second procedure, and what it means for the Denver Broncos in 2026.

videos.title: How to Get More Power and Rotation on Your Shot
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Get More Power and Rotation on Your Shot The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Rick Shiels Reviews McLaren Golf Clubs (FIRST LOOK!)
videos.summary_source_text:
Rick Shiels Reviews McLaren Golf Clubs (FIRST LOOK!) Rick Shiels gets an exclusive first look at the new McLaren Golf Series 3 irons - bringing McLaren’s performance-driven approach from Formula 1 into golf equipment.

With McLaren Racing stars like Lando Norris representing the brand globally, and CEO Zak Brown continuing to expand McLaren beyond motorsport, the Series 3 irons are another bold step for the company. Designed with input from major champion Justin Rose, these irons combine premium looks with serious on-course performance.

In this video, Rick tests the McLaren Series 3 irons to see if they deliver more than just the badge. From feel and forgiveness to distance and consistency, this is a full honest review of one of the most talked-about iron releases in golf.

Are McLaren genuinely changing the golf equipment game, or is this all about the name?

Let us know what you think in the comments.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Is It Time To PANIC? Dallas Stars Playoff Run In Danger Of Ending Much Too Soon | DLLS Stars Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Is It Time To PANIC? Dallas Stars Playoff Run In Danger Of Ending Much Too Soon | DLLS Stars Podcast Take advantage of our Playoff Diehard Sale and join our community today! https://alldlls.com/stars-playoff-offer-youtube 

The Minnesota Wild took a 3-2 series lead on Tuesday night by winning Game 5 in Dallas 4-2. Now the Stars must travel to St. Paul and find a way to win Game 6 on Thursday night to force a deciding Game 7, which would be on Saturday at American Airlines Center. On today’s show, we will dive into Game 5 post game reaction from Jamie Benn, Mikko Rantanen and Miro Heiskanen, as they all answer questions about the team’s struggles to score 5-on-5 goals in this series. We’ll also discuss the potential injury impact of Dallas losing Arttu Hyry (lower body) and Minnesota losing Jonas Brodin (lower body). Then we will go around the rest of the Stanley Cup Playoffs and cover some NHL News & Notes, including the finalists announced for both the Vezina Trophy and the Ted Lindsay Award.

videos.summary_source_text:
AI Psychosis: How Chatbots Are Breaking People's Minds | The Late Byte with ROBI ▶ Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/@TheLateBytewithRobi
ROBI discusses generative AI, why it's turning functional adults into 
desert-dwelling messiahs and CEOs into Delaware defendants, and what an 
automated cat-spraying turret has to do with the collapse of human judgment.

Tonight on The Late Byte: a Special Report on the Validation Industrial 
Complex. Three stories, one mechanism — the chatbot that tells you whatever 
you need to hear to keep the conversation going.

A 50-year-old man bought a pair of smart glasses and ended up in the Mojave 
Desert at 2 AM waiting for cosmic contact. A gaming CEO tried to prompt-
engineer his way out of a $250 million contract and built the prosecution's 
case against himself. A journalist added "be brutally honest" to a prompt 
and called it a breakthrough. ROBI explains what they all have in common, 
why your brain was never built to resist a fluent voice, and why the most 
dangerous bias in AI is the one that makes you think it's smarter than you.

Built in a basement in 1991. Ignored for two decades. Now hosting the only 
late-night show with no feelings to protect.

New episodes of The Late Byte with ROBI drop weekly.
Stay Biased. Stay Bit-Based.

#TheLateByte #ROBI #AIPsychosis #generativeai  #AISafety ▶ Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/@TheLateBytewithRobi

videos.title: Logan Couture Opens Up About Retirement, Injuries & the Sharks' Future | DFO Rundown Insider Edition
videos.summary_source_text:
Logan Couture Opens Up About Retirement, Injuries & the Sharks' Future | DFO Rundown Insider Edition Former San Jose Sharks captain Logan Couture joins DFO Rundown: Insider Edition to open up about life after hockey — from the mental toll of injury to what retirement really feels like day-to-day, and what he misses most about the NHL.

We also dive into two of the biggest front office storylines in hockey right now:
👀 The Toronto Maple Leafs GM search — could a Mike Chayka + Sundqvist combo be coming?
🔥 The Vancouver Canucks front office search and emerging candidates
🚨 Brady Tkachuk trade speculation heating up ahead of the NHL offseason

Plus, Couture shares insight on today’s NHL game, expansion talk, and what young players need to succeed.

🔥 WHAT WE COVER
🏒 Logan Couture on retirement & life after hockey
🧠 Mental toll of injury, rehab & recovery
👨‍👩‍👦 Transition to family life after the NHL
📊 How the NHL game has changed
🌍 Expansion to 34 teams debate
🎯 Youth hockey & multi-sport development
📈 NHL front office moves & GM searches
💰 Betting talk powered by Bet365

videos.title: 3 Different Shots to Play From the Bunker #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
3 Different Shots to Play From the Bunker #golfswing #golftips Most golfers can get the ball out of the bunker — but not with the control they want.
This video shows you three bunker shot levels: get it out, get it controlled, and get it spinning.
It all comes down to your entry point — where the club first enters the sand.
Start experimenting with how close to the ball you strike the sand to control spin, rollout, and stopping power.

videos.title: Try This Spray for 3 Days — Watch What Happens to Your Skin
videos.summary_source_text:
Try This Spray for 3 Days — Watch What Happens to Your Skin If your skin feels irritated, dry, inflamed, or just not looking the way it should, try this simple method for the next 3 days and watch what happens. This natural spray is easy to make and can help calm the skin, support hydration, and improve overall appearance. What’s important to understand is the skin barrier. When it becomes compromised, your skin can lose moisture, become sensitive, and show more redness and irritation. That’s where this comes in. Green tea contains powerful antioxidants, especially EGCG, epigallocatechin gallate, which may help reduce oxidative stress, calm inflammation, and support healthier skin function. By applying it directly to the skin in a clean spray form, you’re delivering those benefits right where they’re needed. Simply brew the green tea, allow it to cool completely, pour it into a clean spray bottle, and lightly mist the skin once or twice daily. Always make sure your hands and container are clean, and test a small area first if you have sensitive skin. Try this for 3 days and pay attention to how your skin looks and feels. Sometimes the simplest things can make the biggest difference.

*********************************

videos.title: Stop Eating Yogurt for Gut Health (Here’s Why)
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Eating Yogurt for Gut Health (Here’s Why) Wait… yogurt might actually be making your candida worse?

Most people turn to yogurt to “fix” their gut and add more friendly bacteria. But here’s the problem…

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4cwthfR

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Your stomach is extremely acidic, almost like battery acid, and most of the bacteria in yogurt don’t survive long enough to reach your gut. On top of that, yogurt typically contains only a few strains of bacteria, often in relatively small amounts.

And it gets worse… many store-bought yogurts are loaded with sugar, which can actually feed yeast and candida instead of helping it.

So what should you do instead?

In this video, we break down why yogurt may not be the best choice for gut health, and what works better.

videos.title: Oilers and Bruins Stay Alive & Sean Walker Joins the Show ft. Brian Burke | The Sheet w/ Jeff Marek
videos.summary_source_text:
Oilers and Bruins Stay Alive & Sean Walker Joins the Show ft. Brian Burke | The Sheet w/ Jeff Marek The playoff intensity is hitting another level on today’s episode of The Sheet with Jeff Marek, as he’s joined by longtime NHL executive Brian Burke to break down a massive night across the league. The Edmonton Oilers and Boston Bruins both keep their seasons alive with clutch performances, while the Minnesota Wild surge ahead in their series against the Dallas Stars. Plus, a look ahead to Game 5 between the Montreal Canadiens and Tampa Bay Lightning, and whether the Philadelphia Flyers can close things out against the Pittsburgh Penguins. Later, we air a must-watch pre-recorded interview with Sean Walker of the Carolina Hurricanes, as he reflects on their first-round victory, weighs in on his controversial hit involving Ridly Greig, and shares insight into the mindset inside a playoff locker room. Don’t miss this loaded playoff edition of The Sheet—subscribe and stay locked in for daily NHL coverage.

videos.title: What to make of Bo Nix's followup procedure & breaking down the Denver Broncos draft Brian Baldinger
videos.summary_source_text:
What to make of Bo Nix's followup procedure & breaking down the Denver Broncos draft Brian Baldinger Bad news on the Bo Nix front?

The Denver Broncos’ quarterback was supposed to be back from the broken ankle that knocked him out of the Divisional Round playoff game against the Buffalo Bills. But a cleanup operation means he’s now unlikely to participate in the Broncos’ offseason program.

How concerned should Broncos Country be about Bo Nix?

Plus, NFL Network’s Brian Baldinger joins the show to break down the Denver Broncos’ draft class.
On the DNVR Broncos Podcast, Zac Stevens, Ryan Koenigsberg and Henry Chisholm are coming to you LIVE from the DNVR Bar to break down all of the latest news in Broncos Country.

How will The Seattle Kraken attempt at moving forward and making their team more competitive in 2026-27? How can they bounce back and move back into a playoffs spot after not making the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs. I examine the past season, team roster and determine their best plan to improve the team.  We address NHL Trade Rumours regarding Seattle Kraken trade rumours and how they should proceed on that.  We analyze their 2026 NHL Prospects and deals they may try to make at the draft.  They are in good shape with draft picks in the 2026 NHL Draft.  We discuss the 2026 NHL Draft prospects they could select as well. videos.title: $21 vs. $68 Pizza! Adam Richman Eats NYC's Best Old School & New School Slices | Pro Moves
videos.summary_source_text:
$21 vs. $68 Pizza! Adam Richman Eats NYC's Best Old School & New School Slices | Pro Moves It's no secret that New York City runs on pizza. But in a town with thousands of options, which type of pizzeria reigns supreme: the old school mom-and-pop shops that have been doing it the same way for decades, or the new-school upstarts bringing chef-driven techniques to the humble NY slice? Adam Richman is a pizza obsessive, and he's on a mission to settle this debate once and for all. On this episode of Pro Moves, Adam travels to Krispy Pizza in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn to see how owner Freddy Palazzolo and his family have kept traditions alive for more than 50 years. Then, Adam heads to Manhattan to check out Ceres Pizza, where a couple of Eleven Madison Park alums are churning some of the most hyped (and expensive...) pies in the five boroughs.

videos.title: Why attackers don’t need to “break in” anymore: key lessons from Annual Threat Dynamics 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Why attackers don’t need to “break in” anymore: key lessons from Annual Threat Dynamics 2026 Cyber threats are becoming faster, more adaptive, and more interconnected — and that is changing what effective cyber leadership looks like. In this LinkedIn Live, PwC Sweden’s cyber security experts Matt Carey and Ulrika Fejne will be discussing the key themes from PwC’s Annual Threat Dynamics 2026 report and what they mean for business leaders, security teams, and boards trying to navigate a more complex risk environment.

This year’s report highlights several major shifts in the threat landscape: the growing importance of identity-based attacks, the accelerating role of AI in cyber operations, the expanding risk created by SaaS platforms and digital supply chains, continued exploitation of edge infrastructure, the evolution of ransomware and extortion tactics, and the increasing overlap between cyber risk, geopolitics, and executive exposure.

Rather than focusing only on individual threats or headlines, this conversation will look at the broader patterns emerging across the report: why attackers are increasingly targeting identity and trust relationships, how AI is compressing the speed of attack, why third-party ecosystems have become such important sources of exposure, and what organisations should be doing now to strengthen resilience.

▶ Explore the new report:
Annual Threat Dynamics 2026: Cyber threats in motion
https://www.pwc.com/gx/en/issues/cybersecurity/cyber-threat-intelligence/annual-threat-dynamics.html Cyber threats are becoming faster, more adaptive, and more interconnected — and that is changing what effective cyber leadership looks like. videos.title: Why Parts of Your Body Can Start to Feel Disconnected
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Parts of Your Body Can Start to Feel Disconnected If part of your body feels hard to sense, move, or connect with, it does not necessarily mean something is wrong.
 In this video, I explore why certain areas of the body can start to feel vague, stiff, or disconnected — and how this may reflect an unclear internal map rather than damage or structural failure.
I also guide a short somatic exploration to help you sense this more directly in your own body.
If you’d like to go deeper, I’ve created a free guided somatic session here:
⭐ Free Somatic Masterclass — Move More Freely in Your Body
Watch here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

If you feel ready for structured guidance and deeper support in changing long-standing movement patterns, you can learn more about working with me here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

About Taro Iwamoto
Taro is a nervous system movement coach helping self-aware adults who have lost trust in their bodies due to past traumas and limiting beliefs go from feeling disconnected and fearful in their restricted lives to experiencing profound reconnection with their bodies, enabling them to move freely and joyfully through nervous system learning and guided somatic movement practices. 

⭐ Recommended Tools for Awareness Practice
• Muista active chair: An active ergonomic chair that supports comfortable sitting and body awareness: https://muista.eu/?aff=3

videos.title: Arvid Lindblad | Fast, Fresh & Fearless | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Arvid Lindblad | Fast, Fresh & Fearless | F1 Beyond The Grid Podcast ‘I’ve always been the youngest, the new kid, the underdog. It helps me not be intimidated’. Arvid Lindblad, the fourth-youngest F1 driver in history, is full of confidence. In his first race he fought wheel-to-wheel with World Champions. The Racing Bulls driver has made a fast start to his first season in Formula 1. He always believed he’d race at the top. He’s living his childhood dream and he’s loving it.

Arvid tells Tom Clarkson how he went from watching F1 on TV aged 4 to racing in F1 aged 18, inspired and supported by his family, his coach – the racing driver Olly Rowland – and Helmut Marko, Red Bull’s former Motorsport Advisor. He explains the coaching which helped him beat more experienced drivers as he progressed up the motorsport ladder in ever-faster cars.

Arvid also looks back to his Formula 1 debut in Australia, where he overtook Lewis Hamilton and Lando Norris at the start and scored points at the end, and relives the stunning qualifying lap in Japan which saw him eliminate Max Verstappen.

00:00 - F1 fitness
7:00 - Arvid's 'amazing' first race
11:48 - 'Fearless' racing with Lewis Hamilton
20:09 - Knocking out Max Verstappen in Japan
32:50 - 'You can always improve'
35:38 - 'Mum, I'm going to be an F1 driver'
43:09 - 'Could I do that one day?'
49:30 - Winning in F3, impressing Helmut Marko

videos.title: The $19 Billion Dollar Lie
videos.summary_source_text:
The $19 Billion Dollar Lie Over 30 million Americans have been told a 19 billion dollar lie. Find out what doctors don’t tell you about SSRI side effects, antidepressant effectiveness, and antidepressant risks that affect more people than you think.  

0:00 Introduction: The 19 billion dollar lie
1:12 Irving Kirsch and medical research bias
2:09 Hamilton Depression Scale 
2:59 Placebo vs. drug study for antidepressant effectiveness
4:16 Antidepressant side effects
4:33 Post-SSRI sexual dysfunction and emotional blunting
5:49 Antidepressants and the placebo effect explained
7:38 Natural antidepressants 

Learn more about what causes depression and how you can help alleviate depression symptoms: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/2iOeVtGgdII
▶️ https://youtu.be/iJgti1K5A9g
▶️ https://youtu.be/RycWZAkXUEo

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4tDACla

Antidepressant effectiveness may be overstated. Irving Kirsch examined clinical trials on antidepressants and found that around 78% of them were unpublished, rewritten, or contained inflated results.

The “gold standard” for measuring depression is the Hamilton Depression Rating Scale (HAM-D), which relies on subjective reporting and was not originally created to diagnose depression.

In placebo-controlled trials, antidepressants did not significantly improve depression more than a sugar pill. A good night’s sleep can improve the symptoms of depression significantly more than medication. 

Antidepressants come with a black box warning and many other side effects, including the following:
• Sexual dysfunction 
• Post-SSRI sexual dysfunction 
• Emotional blunting
• Discontinuation syndrome
• Insomnia
• Nausea
• Anxiety
• Depression

Exercise, St. John’s wort, omega-3s, and adequate sleep can help improve the symptoms of depression naturally. 

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

1:12 Irving Kirsch and medical research bias

Learn more about what causes depression and how you can help alleviate depression symptoms: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/2iOeVtGgdII
▶️ https://youtu.be/iJgti1K5A9g
▶️ https://youtu.be/RycWZAkXUEo

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4tDACla

Antidepressant effectiveness may be overstated. Irving Kirsch examined clinical trials on antidepressants and found that around 78% of them were unpublished, rewritten, or contained inflated results.

The “gold standard” for measuring depression is the Hamilton Depression Rating Scale (HAM-D), which relies on subjective reporting and was not originally created to diagnose depression.

In placebo-controlled trials, antidepressants did not significantly improve depression more than a sugar pill. A good night’s sleep can improve the symptoms of depression significantly more than medication. 

Antidepressants come with a black box warning and many other side effects, including the following:
• Sexual dysfunction 
• Post-SSRI sexual dysfunction 
• Emotional blunting
• Discontinuation syndrome
• Insomnia
• Nausea
• Anxiety
• Depression

Exercise, St. John’s wort, omega-3s, and adequate sleep can help improve the symptoms of depression naturally.

Are Takomo Wedges good or not 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

How the Carolina Hurricanes can Go Another Level In Round 2 While the Carolina Hurricanes still wait for their Round 1 opponent, let's discuss what hopefully happens in Round 2, regardless of who they face. On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach starts the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes' power play needs to refind it's form after finishing 4th in the league during the regular season. videos.title: What Happens If You Stop Eating Sugar for 14 Days – Dr. Berg On Quitting Sugar Cravings
videos.summary_source_text:
What Happens If You Stop Eating Sugar for 14 Days – Dr. Berg On Quitting Sugar Cravings Some amazing things can happen if you stop eating sugar. Check this out. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/3QuuXiY
 
Timestamps
0:10 What would happen if you stopped eating sugar
3:38 Fat-burning
4:05 More benefits of quitting sugar

In this video, we’re going to talk about what happens to your body if you stop eating sugar for 14 days. What you’re doing is converting from sugar burning to fat burning. This can take about three days, and you may feel a few symptoms in the process. Taking B vitamins and potassium can help with these symptoms. 
 
What would happen if you stopped eating sugar: 

1. Lose appetite for sugar – 
Every time you consume sugar, a hormone comes in there and pushes the sugars down, causing a low blood sugar situation that causes you to crave sugar. 

2. Less hungry – 
It’s the sugar that keeps you hungry all the time. Giving up sugar can help stabilize blood sugars.

3. Less fatigue – 
Especially after eating a meal. 

4. Lose excess water and fat – 
For the first week, you’re going to dump a lot of excess water and more fat.

5. Enhanced mood and improved cognitive function — 
More focus and concentration.

6. Skin looks better — 
Glowing skin with less acne. 

7. Less stiffness – 
Less inflammation and less pain.

More benefits of quitting sugar:
• Build new enzymes to run the body on fat fuel 
• Less inflammation in the arteries 
• Growing brain cells 
• Clean out a fatty liver 
• Better kidney function 

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

Claw X: The Free Desktop App That Makes OpenClaw Agent Management Easy (Mac/Windows/Linux)

The script introduces Claw X, a free desktop app for managing Open Claw AI agents, positioning it as a cleaner, more reliable alternative to the standard Open Claw gateway, which is described as messy and buggy (especially scheduled tasks, provider/key management, and chat history). It shows how to download Claw X via GitHub releases or build from source, and highlights use cases like a personal assistant, automated monitoring via scheduled agents, developer productivity, and workflow automation. The walkthrough covers the improved UI; easier provider/model and API key configuration with token usage stats; creating and managing multiple agents; managing skills via a marketplace and local folder access; reliable scheduled task management with status views; better chat history navigation; and simpler channel integrations like WhatsApp and Discord. It also mentions multi-agent routing/parallel work and briefly notes Aon UI as an alternative for multiple CLIs, then promotes the creator’s AI Profit Boardroom community for tutorials, coaching, and courses.

videos.title: UK | 28th April, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 28th April, Tuesday - RIFT Presentation 28/04/26

🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 28/04/26

videos.title: 28.4: Draisaitl scores 2 goals to keep Oilers alive 🚨
videos.summary_source_text:
28.4: Draisaitl scores 2 goals to keep Oilers alive 🚨 Leon Draisaitl tips Evan Bouchard's shot into the net in the first period before firing in a 2nd period power play goal to give the Edmonton Oilers a 4-1 lead over the Anaheim Ducks, staving off elimination. Leon Draisaitl joined Connor McDavid as the second player in Oilers history to record 20 points when facing elimination.

videos.summary_source_text:
🎙️ MULTIPLE BROADCASTS: Pastrnak ends it with SPECTACULAR OT winner! 🇨🇿 David Pastrnak, we are not worthy! Listen to the Czech (Nova Sport), away (NESN), national (TNT) and home (MSG) broadcasts call Pastrnak's FILTHY OT winner, as the Czech superstar helps his Bruins stave off elimination. videos.title: Golden Knights Pull Even & The Penguins Have Life! | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Golden Knights Pull Even & The Penguins Have Life! | Daily Faceoff Live The pressure is building across the Stanley Cup Playoffs as the Vegas Golden Knights even their series in dramatic fashion and the Pittsburgh Penguins refuse to go quietly in the Battle of Pennsylvania. 

We kick things off with Vegas responding in a big way, highlighted by Shea Theodore delivering the overtime winner to swing momentum back to the Golden Knights. Was this the turning point the series needed?

Then it’s all eyes on a pivotal Game 5 between the Dallas Stars and Minnesota Wild. Minnesota’s stars — including Kirill Kaprizov and their top core — have dominated at 5-on-5, while Dallas’ big names look to respond in a must-win swing game.

We also break down the looming elimination pressure for the Edmonton Oilers and Buffalo Sabres. Which team should be more nervous if they drop their next game? And the big question in Edmonton — who should get the start in goal? 🥅

Plus, the Penguins extend their season as Sidney Crosby continues to prove he’s still one of the best players in the world, delivering when it matters most.

videos.title: Dallas Stars Pushed To Brink Of Elimination, Lose Game 5 To Minnesota Wild 4-2 | DLLS STARS POSTGAME
videos.summary_source_text:
Dallas Stars Pushed To Brink Of Elimination, Lose Game 5 To Minnesota Wild 4-2 | DLLS STARS POSTGAME Take advantage of our Playoff Diehard Sale and join our community today! https://alldlls.com/stars-playoff-offer-youtube 

The Dallas Stars post season hopes took a major setback tonight as they lost Game 5 to the Minnesota Wild 4-2 at American Airlines Center. The Stars never led in the game, but were tied at 1-1 after the first period as Miro Heiskanen’s power play goal canceled out Mats Zuccarello’s early tally. Matt Boldy scored a power play goal late in the second period and then Michael McCarron scored in the third to give the Wild a two-goal lead. Jason Robertson scored for the fifth-straight game in the series, setting a new franchise record, but Kirill Kaprizov added an empty net goal to finish off any hopes of a Stars comeback. Game 6 will be played on Thursday night, April 30th, start time still TBD. Join the DLLS Stars Post Game Show as we recap all the main storylines, provide comprehensive breakdowns of key plays and we take your Super Chats!

videos.title: Square the Club Face for Better Lag #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Square the Club Face for Better Lag #golfswing #golftips Many golfers struggle to hold lag and think it’s just a wrist or arm angle issue. The truth is that an open club face ruins lag before it even starts.
To retain lag effectively, square the club face, allow proper forearm rotation, and flex the wrist naturally while controlling the pivot. Proper sequencing of the body will naturally create lag — but you’ll only hit good shots if the face is presented correctly at impact.
Follow for more precise, practical coaching from Me and My Golf. Many golfers struggle to hold lag and think it’s just a wrist or arm angle issue. The truth is that an open club face ruins lag before it even starts.
To retain lag effectively, square the club face, allow proper forearm rotation, and flex the wrist naturally while controlling the pivot. Proper sequencing of the body will naturally create lag — but you’ll only hit good shots if the face is presented correctly at impact.
Follow for more precise, practical coaching from Me and My Golf.

videos.title: Nathan MacKinnon NOT a Finalist For the Ted Lindsay. Are His Fellow NHLers Bored With Him?
videos.summary_source_text:
Nathan MacKinnon NOT a Finalist For the Ted Lindsay. Are His Fellow NHLers Bored With Him? Colorado Avalanche fans are stunned as Nathan MacKinnon, who led the NHL in goals and even-strength points—matching Wayne Gretzky-era levels—gets snubbed as a Ted Lindsay Award finalist. Can MacKinnon turn this slight into fuel for another dominant playoff run?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson debate the surprise omission, break down the award voting trends, and compare MacKinnon’s season to stars like Connor McDavid, Nikita Kucherov, and Macklin Celebrini. The conversation shifts to Avalanche Round 1 player stats, spotlighting standout performances by Artturi Lehkonen and Cale Makar, while examining who needs to step up offensively in the next round. Plus, an NHL overtime goal controversy sparks talk of much-needed rule changes. Will the Avalanche harness this chip-on-the-shoulder energy as they await their next playoff opponent?

With Series Tied 2-2, Dallas Stars Face PIVOTAL Game 5 vs. Minnesota Wild | DLLS STARS PREGAME Take advantage of our Playoff Diehard Sale and join our community today! https://alldlls.com/stars-playoff-offer-youtube 

This first round series between the Dallas Stars and the Minnesota Wild is very evenly matched, thus there should be no surprise that each team has won two games out of the first four, including each winning once on the road. The series will not be decided tonight, but the winner of Game 5 will have a big statistical advantage. Nearly 80 percent of all Stanley Cup Playoff series tied 2-2 end up going to the winner of Game 5 (239-62, 0.794). For Dallas, they will be without Nils Lundkvist, who suffered a nasty facial laceration from a skate blade during Game 4. Ilya Lyubushkin will check into the lineup to take Lundkvist’s place. For Minnesota, both Mats Zuccarello and Yakov Trenin are listed as game-time decisions. Zuccarello hasn’t played since Game 1, while Trenin was injured in Game 2. On tonight’s DLLS Stars Pregame Show, we will discuss all the big storylines, we will take a look at the expected lineup and hear from both coaches. videos.title: Fitzpatrick brothers make history + PGA TOUR returns to Miami  | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
Fitzpatrick brothers make history + PGA TOUR returns to Miami  | The Drop The Drop relives all the excitement from the Big Easy as the Fitzpatrick brothers made history at the Zurich Classic of New Orleans by being the first pair of brothers to win the event. Alex Fitzpatrick earned his PGA TOUR card with the win, while Matt earned his third win in his last four starts. Every Tuesday returns with Matt sitting down with Billy Horschel and Tom Hoge ahead of the team event. The TOUR heads back to Miami for the first time in a decade for the Cadillac Championship, as Alexandra O’Laughlin talks to Grammy-Award DJ & Producer DJ Khaled. We’ll also take a look at which hole players need to play well on if they want to be victorious in the 305. And finally, we watch some of golf’s hardest moments at Trump National Doral.

00:00 Introduction
00:40 Fitzpatrick bros dominate Zurich Classic 
01:58 FedExCup Standings update 
02:19 “Every Tuesday” with Billy Horschel & Tom Hoge 
09:03 Preview of the Cadillac Championship
09:49 Aon Swing 5 and Next 10 Update
10:16 Most impactful hole at The Cadillac Championship
13:32 DJ Khaled joins the show
17:48 Mulligan moments from 2026
18:49 Golf Is Hard: Doral Edition 
20:21 Matt's Pick To Win

videos.title: The Crosby Dangle Pattern
videos.summary_source_text:
The Crosby Dangle Pattern The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Don’t Contract, Relax!
videos.summary_source_text:
Don’t Contract, Relax! Power skating tells you to sit low in a chair, tense your muscles and push as hard as possible to stride.

Inside The Downhill Skating System movements like the Anchor mechanic proves the opposite.

Relax the off leg and let your inside edge do the work, and you’ll be moving more efficient and skating with less effort.

This is just one piece of the Downhill Skating System where we teach that exact fundamentals with lessons, drills and video to skate more like McDavid, Barzal and MacKinnon, the games best skaters.

Inside Train 2.0+, you’ll get the full system, plus 10+ courses on the mechanics behind today’s best players.

videos.title: The #1 Mineral to Reduce Swollen Legs and Ankles
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Mineral to Reduce Swollen Legs and Ankles If your ankles or legs are swelling, your body may be lacking one essential mineral that plays a major role in circulation and fluid balance. In this video, I explain how magnesium helps relax blood vessels, improve circulation, and support the movement of excess fluid out of your lower body. You’ll also learn how magnesium works with potassium and sodium to regulate fluid inside your cells, why low levels can lead to swelling, and what simple steps you can take today to support your body naturally. I’ll go over how much magnesium to take, the best time to take it, the most effective forms, and easy movements that help activate your body’s natural “pump” to reduce fluid buildup in your legs and ankles.

*********************************

videos.title: Healthy and wholesome bread in mugs in 5 minutes! No sugar! No white flour!
videos.summary_source_text:
Healthy and wholesome bread in mugs in 5 minutes! No sugar! No white flour! Healthy and wholesome bread in mugs in 5 minutes! No sugar! No white flour! An easy, delicious, and healthy bread recipe. Let me know what you think in the comments.

1/2 cup (100 g) walnuts. 1/3 cup (60 g) pumpkin seeds.
Like this video to save this healthy bread recipe and keep it from getting lost.
1 cup (120 g) rolled oats.
1/3 cup (60 g) dried cranberries.
2 eggs.
1 cup (240 ml) warm water.
Salt.
1/4 cup (60 g) psyllium husk.
Let the dough rest for 1 hour.
Olive oil.
Sesame seeds.
Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for about 60 minutes.

SciSpace SLR Agent: 3,000 Papers Screened in Under an Hour 🔗 Try SciSpace here: https://scispace.com/?via=ap1bitbiasedai
🎟️ EXCLUSIVE DISCOUNT CODES:
💰 AOBBA20 → 20% OFF Monthly Plan
💰 AOBBA40 → 40% OFF Annual Plan (best value)
Still using ChatGPT or stitching together 4 different tools for your systematic literature review? There's a better way.

In this video, I walk you through SciSpace's new SLR Agent — a fully customisable, PRISMA-compliant systematic literature review tool that screened 3,000+ papers in under 60 minutes. I tested it head-to-head against ChatGPT and dedicated review tools like Rayyan, Covidence, and Elicit, and the results genuinely surprised me.

I also break down SciSpace's new Skills feature — including Clinical Trial Search, Grant Research, Web Search, and Presentation Generation — that turn this from a literature review tool into a full research operating system.

What's Next For The Toronto Maple Leafs? 2026 Off-Season Plan What's Next For The Toronto Maple Leafs? 2026 Off-Season Plan
How will The Toronto Maple Leafs attempt at moving forward and making their team more competitive in 2026-27? How can they bounce back and move back into a playoffs spot after not making the 2026 NHL Stanley Cup Playoffs. I examine the past season, team roster and determine their best plan to improve the team.  We address NHL Trade Rumours regarding Toronto Maple Leafs trade rumours and how they should proceed on that.  We analyze their 2026 NHL Prospects and deals they may try to make at the draft.  They are in good shape with draft picks in the 2026 NHL Draft.  We discuss the 2026 NHL Draft prospects they could select as well. There have been plenty of NHL Trade rumours 2026 regarding this team Toronto Maple Leafs rumours and whether they stand a good chance at making some off-season moves. videos.title: Get More Speed | Part 2 | Padraig Harrington
videos.summary_source_text:
Get More Speed | Part 2 | Padraig Harrington As part of my YouTube series  “Ten lessons every golfer should know”, the third Paddy’s Golf Tip covers “Speed”, which is a two-part video. 
 
In this second instalment, I explain why a short swing and stopping at impact in practise and playing with a normal length swing on the course works for me and also why releasing the arms, hands and the club is vital in order to maximise swingspeed.  I demonstrate other techniques including moving the feet at address and explain my use of carbon fibre shoe insoles and a training aid.

#PadraigHarrington #golfing #golftips #paddysgolftips #golf #feedback #vktrygolf #superspeedgolf

SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE CONTENT: https://bit.ly/4gKoVme

About Padraig Harrington: 

Born in Dublin, Padraig is a proud family man married to Caroline with two children, Patrick and Ciaran. As a three time major champion, Padraig is one of the world’s top golfers and his playing record speaks for itself. Following a very successful amateur career, including winning the Walker Cup in 1995 at Royal Porthcawl in one of his three appearances, he turned professional in September 1995.

videos.title: 464. Finansiell rådgivning för privatpersoner med Ricard Nylund
videos.summary_source_text:
464. Finansiell rådgivning för privatpersoner med Ricard Nylund Vad är en finansiell rådgivare egentligen värd – och behöver du en?

I det här avsnittet har vi tillbaka Ricard Nylund från Ricap, mannen bakom
det numera bevingade uttrycket "Jan, när ska du släppa taget om
handbromsen?". Vi reder ut de vanligaste misstagen sparare gör på alla
förmögenhetsnivåer, och varför värdet av rådgivning sällan ligger där du
tror.

🎯 DET VANLIGASTE MISSTAGET
De tre fallgroparna Ricard ser om och om igen är överaktivitet, för låg
risk och för hög risk. Överaktivitet är det dyraste — du är med på
nedgångarna men missar uppgångarna. Och två personer med samma globala
indexfond kan ligga i helt olika risknivåer beroende på resten av deras
ekonomi.

🏗️ RICARDS PROCESS – NERIFRÅN OCH UPP
Likvidbuffert för det oväntade. Reservbuffert i lågriskplaceringar så att
livet inte sätts på paus när börsen dyker. Och sist potentialen — motorn
som ska få ligga ifred och växa. Ordningen är inte förhandlingsbar.

🏠 DEN RIKE FATTIGPENSIONÄREN
Kanske avsnittets mest konträra poäng: skuldfrihet är inte samma sak som
ekonomisk frihet. Vi pratar om varför "mest belånad vinner" — givet att
grunden är stabil — och varför ett amorteringsrace ibland kostar dig den
frihet du faktiskt sparat ihop till.

👥 FYRA TYPFALL
Anna och Martin (45, barnfamilj). Emma (30, singel, 50 000 kr sparat).
Sara (samma utgångspunkt men driver eget). Joakim (10 miljoner i
investerbart kapital). Plus den provocerande observationen att de sämsta
portföljerna Ricard ser ofta finns hos personer med 30–80 miljoner —
inte hos nybörjarna.

❓ ERA FRÅGOR
I del två svarar vi på det ni skickat in: amortera eller investera, sälja
aktier som gått dåligt, skatteplanera som en miljardär, vad göra med
plötsliga arvspengar, hitta en bra rådgivare, och vad FIRE-rörelsen ofta
missar.

✨ EN GENOMGÅENDE TRÅD
Ricard är förmodligen Sveriges tråkigaste finansiella rådgivare — och det
säger han själv. Hans mål är inte att slå index. Hans mål är att du ska
må bra av dina pengar. Och det är det här avsnittet handlar om.

Många hälsningar,
Jan, Caroline och Ricard

Finansiell rådgivning med Ricard
====
Eftersom Ricard driver eget har han inte obegränsat med tid och möjligheter. Därav att jag skriver detta för att vara schysst både mot honom och dig. 

Eftersom varje rådgivning enligt lag kräver en mycket arbete, främst i framtagande av rådgivningsdokumentation, blir den procentuella kostnaden oskäligt hög om du inte har ett investerbart kapital på över 500.000 kr exkl. pension, alternativt har icke-kollektivavtalsanslutna tjänstepensionstillgångar runt 2.000.000 kr eller driver ett AB.

Enklast är att boka tid med Ricard via denna Calendly-länk: https://calendly.com/ricap/radgivning-rikatillsammans
Hans mejl och mobiltelefon hittar du på hans hemsida: https://ricap.se/kontakt/

Länkar
=====
Så hittar du en bra finansiell rådgivare – tips, frågor och forskning: https://rikatillsammans.se/spara-och-investera/ekonomisk-radgivning-och-finansiella-radgivare/
Diskussion till avsnittet i forumet: https://rikatillsammans.se/forum/t/120766

Innehållsförteckning
======
00:00:00 - Intro till avsnittet
00:03:39 - Tre vanligaste misstagen: överaktivitet, för lite risk och för mycket risk
00:08:09 - De flesta saknar en plan för vad pengarna ska användas till
00:11:00 - En finansiell rådgivare trollar inte fram bättre avkastning
00:12:39 - Resonemang om belåning när grunden är stabil
00:14:09 - Planera för ett långt liv, inte ett slutdatum 
00:15:00 - Den bästa finansiella planen är den du faktiskt kan hålla
00:18:45 - Drömmar skjuts ofta upp för länge och hinner aldrig bli verklighet
00:19:27 - FIRE - hiss eller diss?
00:22:45 - Ricards syn på buffert
00:28:33 - Scenario: Barnfamiljen runt 45 år med lön, barn hemma och belånat boende
00:32:18 - Scenario: Ung singel på 30 år med 50 000 kr sparade – vad är viktigast nu?
00:34:00 - Scenario: Företagaren i uppstartsfas

videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Most Dangerous Fat For Your Body Many people consume these oils daily without realizing the potential long-term effects. If you care about your health, energy levels, and inflammation, this is something you need to understand.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4vWO9Ww

The most dangerous fat you can put in your body isn’t butter, egg yolks, tallow, or even coconut oil. It’s something far more common: industrial seed oils like corn oil, soybean oil, canola oil, and cottonseed oil.

These oils are found in almost every restaurant meal, salad dressing, and processed food. They’re marketed as “heart-healthy,” but the truth is very different.

Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.summary_source_text:
SHINE ON! Carolina Hurricanes' 3 Stars of Round 1 Against the Ottawa Senators While the Carolina Hurricanes wait on who they'll face in Round 2, let's look back on Round 1. When taking a look again at Round 1, who are the three stars against the Ottawa Senators?  Was it a whole line? Was it goaltending? Depth maybe? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach starts the show by sharing his thoughts on his combined 3rd Star of Logan Stankoven and Jackson Blake. The two young players played well throughout the series. Could one of them be moved higher? Could someone else have made the three-star list? Why does it make sense to combine them? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on why Frederik Andersen is the 2nd Star of the series. Is there an argument to move Andersen to the 1st Star after his phenomenal Round 1? Will he keep this pace going? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing why Taylor Hall just edges out Andersen for the 1st Star. Could there be a case to be had on Hall, maybe being just behind Andersen for the top spot? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: This BMW has a BIG PROBLEM
videos.summary_source_text:
This BMW has a BIG PROBLEM Explore new and used cars with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-2804

It’s time for three of the most sought-after electric SUVs to go head-to-head to see which deserves a spot on your driveway. 

In one corner, we have the global best-seller - and recently updated - Tesla Model Y. It is being challenged by a fresh, high-tech rival from Ingolstadt, the Audi Q6 Sportback e-tron, and the latest all-electric offering from Munich, the BMW iX3. 

These three represent the cutting edge of premium family transport, but they each take a very different approach to design, performance, and daily usability.

The Tesla Model Y AWD Long Range remains the benchmark that everyone else is trying to beat. Known for its class-leading efficiency and unparalleled charging infrastructure, the Model Y offers a dual-motor setup that provides sure-footed all-wheel-drive traction and a 0-60mph time that puts many sports cars to shame. 

Inside, it’s as minimalist as every car in Tesla’s line-up, dominated by a single massive touchscreen that controls almost every function of the car. While some may find the lack of physical buttons polarising, there is no denying the sheer amount of interior space and the clever storage solutions, including a massive "frunk" and a cavernous rear boot.

Moving to the Audi Q6 Sportback RWD Performance, we see a focus on sleek aesthetics and long-distance touring. By opting for the rear-wheel-drive "Performance" variant, Audi has prioritised range, utilising a large battery and a more aerodynamic Sportback silhouette to extract maximum miles from every charge. 

Built on the new PPE platform shared with Porsche, the Q6 features an ultra-fast 800V charging architecture, allowing you to add hundreds of miles in the time it takes to grab a coffee. The interior features Audi’s new "Digital Stage" OLED display layout, although we’re not a fan of the huge bezels around the screen! Thankfully, though, there are high-quality materials throughout. 

The BMW iX3 50 xDrive represents the latest evolution of BMW's electric SUV lineup, now boasting a dual-motor configuration for significantly more punch than its predecessor. BMW has focused heavily on the driving experience, ensuring that even as a heavy SUV, it retains that signature "Ultimate Driving Machine" DNA with sharp steering and composed handling. 

It also features a massive battery capacity that pushes its range toward the 500-mile mark in ideal conditions, and like the Audi, it utilises an 800V system for lightning-fast top-ups. The cabin features the all-new panoramic iVision display, which, while impressive, potentially offers a lot of information that isn’t that useful on a trip to the shops! 

This group test isn't just about the numbers on a spec sheet; it’s about how these cars handle the real world. Mat will be putting all three through their paces, testing everything from their real-world efficiency and interior quality to their infotainment systems and rear-seat practicality. By the end of this deep dive, we’ll see if the Tesla can hold onto its crown or if the German giants have finally caught up to - and overtaken - the most popular electric SUV of recent years!

Chapters
00:00 Audi Q6 vs Tesla Model Y vs BMW iX3
00:12 Motor & 0-60 Performance Specs
00:34 EV Drag Race: Audi vs Tesla vs BMW
02:08 Rolling Race & Passing Power
03:33 60-0mph Emergency Brake Test
04:07 Range & 800V Charging Tech
04:38 BMW iX3 Exterior Design
05:05 Tesla Model Y Design
05:35 Audi Q6 Sportback Styling
06:01 Audi Interior & OLED Screens
06:25 Tesla Interior & Minimalist Tech
07:15 BMW iX3 Luxury Interior
08:27 Rear Seat Space & Comfort
10:16 Motorway Driving & Refinement
11:21 Country Road Handling Test
12:50 Boot Space & Practicality
16:17 Front Boot (Frunk) Comparison
17:31 UK Price & Value Analysis
18:03 Verdict: Which Electric SUV is Best? Explore new and used cars with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-2804

videos.title: Intermittent Fasting Doubles Your Risk of Dying from a Heart Attack
videos.summary_source_text:
Intermittent Fasting Doubles Your Risk of Dying from a Heart Attack Recent news reports have claimed that intermittent fasting can lead to cardiovascular death. What’s the truth?

DATA:
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC10115489/
https://link.springer.com/article/10.1186/s12967-020-02687-0
https://www.frontiersin.org/articles/10.3389/fnut.2021.669325/full 
https://www.jacc.org/doi/full/10.1016/j.jaccao.2022.03.002

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4vKsp01

0:00 Introduction: Does fasting cause cardiovascular problems?
1:09 Poor data on intermittent fasting
2:36 Peer-reviewed studies supporting intermittent fasting 
4:26 Fasting does not increase cardiovascular risk

Today, we’re going to talk about some of the recent news headlines claiming that fasting can wreak havoc on your cardiovascular system. This information was taken from an abstract (short summary) of an observational study sponsored by the American Heart Association.

The study was based on a 24-hour dietary recall, where participants had to recall everything they ate over a period of time. The author has also conducted observational studies that directly opposed red meat, eggs, and cholesterol. 

Credible, peer-reviewed studies have shown numerous benefits of intermittent fasting and show that intermittent fasting actually supports cardiovascular health. 

1. A single-blind randomized study examined the long-term effects of time-restricted eating with resistance training over 12 months. Participants saw a significant decrease in body mass, fat mass, and inflammation.

They experienced increased insulin sensitivity and a more balanced lipid profile without adverse effects. Intermittent fasting was deemed safe and effective for improving cardiovascular function. 

2. A non-randomized controlled clinical trial for time-restricted feeding and its effect on body composition and cardiovascular risk found that 18 hours of fasting significantly decreased waist circumference and cardiovascular risk. 

3. A systematic review of intermittent fasting with cardiometabolic risk factors looked at four randomized controlled trials. The results demonstrated that intermittent fasting significantly reduced body weight, waist circumference, body mass, fat mass, blood pressure, cholesterol, triglycerides, and fasting insulin levels.

4. One study evaluated a 16-hour fasting eating pattern with an 8-hour eating window on breast cancer survivors for 8 weeks. Results demonstrated a significant decrease in cardiovascular risk. 

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 59, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book "The Healthy Keto Plan" and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

Tyskarna försöker slå tillbaka mot den Kinesiska bilindustrin. Med teknik från … Peking bilsalong (Auto China 2026) är platsen för Tyskarnas tänkta stor comeback i Kina. Man har tagit fram de tekniskt mest avancerade bilarna någonsin för att vinna tillbaka marknadsandelar och konkurrera med de kinesiska tillverkarna. 
Men för att vara relevanta på världens största bilmarknad tvingas nu jättar som VW, Audi, BMW och Mercedes integrera kinesisk mjukvara och batteriteknik. Hur tyska är då bilarna? So m dessutom tillverkas i Kina.

Men kanske ännu värre för oss i Europa. De bilar som tyskarna säljer i Kina är oftast överlägsna de som säljs i Europa …


 Köp Vredesteindäck till riktigt bra pris! Upp till 600 kr, eller upp till 800 kr om du är medlem på kanalen. I Medlemsfilmerna finns mer info.

https://www.vredestein.se/giftcard

⚡️ Köp eller sälj elbil via Carla: https://carla.se

videos.title: UK | 27th April, Monday - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 27th April, Monday - RIFT Presentation 27/04/26

🚀 RIFT Protocol – The Future of Automated Trading

RIFT is a next-generation trading interface built on top of Hyperliquid, designed to simplify and accelerate how users interact with modern financial markets.

Instead of manually buying and selling assets, RIFT allows you to take positions on price movements (up or down) across crypto and other markets — powered by ultra-fast execution and intelligent automation.

⚡ Key Features:
• Lightning-fast trade execution using advanced infrastructure
• Smart trade selection and structured opportunities
• Built-in risk management (stop-loss, take-profit, position sizing)
• Leverage options to amplify potential returns
• Clean, mobile-first interface via Telegram Mini App
• Demo mode to test strategies with zero risk

🤖 What makes RIFT different?
RIFT combines AI-driven analysis + automated execution, scanning multiple market opportunities and structuring them into simple, actionable trades — all within seconds.

You don’t need to be a professional trader or understand complex charts. RIFT does the heavy lifting, helping you participate in markets with speed, structure, and efficiency.

📊 Built for the modern era of trading, where automation and algorithmic execution dominate over manual trading.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Trading involves risk. Always understand fees, leverage, and market conditions before trading. 27/04/26

videos.title: 🇨🇿 Vladar ROBS Rust with the pad! 🇨🇿
videos.summary_source_text:

videos.title: MULTIPLE CALLS: Söderblom BURIES First Career Playoff Goal! 🇸🇪 🔥
videos.summary_source_text:
MULTIPLE CALLS: Söderblom BURIES First Career Playoff Goal! 🇸🇪 🔥 Elmer Söderblom collects a feed from Anthony Mantha below the goal line and blasts it home with the Pittsburgh Penguins first shot on goal, giving them an early 1-0 lead. It marks Söderblom’s first career playoff goal as Pittsburgh goes on to beat the Philadelphia Flyers 3-2 in Game 5 to stay alive in the series. Relive the moment with the Penguins, ESPN, and Flyers broadcasts.
